arts.sum: Bayer 04 Leverkusen and Hull City have confirmed Gustavo Puerta's permanent transfer to the Isle.

A controversial penalty handed Swansea a 1-0 lead that they never relinquished on Good Friday as Hull were condemned to a devastating away defeat in Wales. Ruben Selles' side are only two points clear...

arts.ttl: Hull City's John Egan remains defiant after Swansea City decision
arts.sum: Republic of Ireland defender John Egan was left frustrated after Hull City's 1-0 loss at Swansea City on Good Friday . The ball has hit my face so I don't know how they've given the penalty.

arts.ttl: Puerta clause activated: Leverkusen loanee to join Hull permanently from July 1st
arts.sum: Hull confirm the Colombian midfielder will remain at the club beyond his loan spell from Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Hull City sign Leverkusen midfielder permanently
arts.sum: Gustavo Puerta joined the Championship team on a permanent basis for an estimated €3.8 million.

arts.ttl: Hull City complete first summer signing as midfielder triggers transfer clause
arts.sum: City will pay Leverkusen 3.5m euros (£3m) to the reigning Bundesliga champions after the 21-year-old reached the number of starts required in the loan deal the Tigers signed back in the summer, which brought Puerta to the MKM Stadium under former manager Tim Walter. Puerta started his 20th game of the season on Friday as the Tigers were beaten 1-0 by Swansea City, a result which left them just two points above the drop zone with only three games to play, before coming off on the hour to be replaced by Matt Crooks, who was later sent off.

arts.ttl: Lewis O'Brien reality as Hull City left counting missed Nottingham Forest transfer opportunity
arts.sum: However, given some of the finances the club have spent in recent years on players who have either no, or very little positive effect on the team, O'Brien feels like a major opportunity missed. City have previously pushed to try and sign O'Brien from Nottingham Forest on multiple occasions, but were put off by the size of the 26-year-old's wages and opted to move elsewhere in the market.
